assignments.name: text
assignments.value: The n8n platform experienced a 15-minute outage today between 14:00 and 14:15 UTC. Root cause was a Redis connection pool exhaustion after a misconfigured worker was deployed. The issue has been resolved and monitoring alerts are now in place. Users are advised to re-run any failed workflows from that window.

messageValues.message: You are a text analysis assistant. Analyse the given text and return structured JSON with: sentiment (positive/negative/neutral), confidence (0–1), a one-sentence summary, up to 5 keywords, and whether action is required. Always match the JSON schema exactly.

parameters.inputSchema: {"type": "object", "properties": {"sentiment": {"type": "string", "enum": ["positive", "negative", "neutral"], "description": "Overall sentiment of the text"}, "confidence": {"type": "number", "minimum": 0, "maximum": 1, "description": "Confidence score between 0 and 1"}, "summary": {"type": "string", "description": "One-sentence summary of the text"}, "keywords": {"type": "array", "items": {"type": "string"}, "description": "Up to 5 key topics or entities"}, "action_required": {"type": "boolean", "description": "Whether the text implies an action is needed"}}, "required": ["sentiment", "confidence", "summary", "keywords", "action_required"]}
